title: Kapitel 16 - HTML Best Practices Check
description: Wissenscheck:  Einrückung, gut lesbarer Code und HTML-Kommentare.

questions.prompt: How do you write a comment in HTML?

byOptionId.slash: Incorrect — // is used in JS/CSS, not HTML comments.
byOptionId.star: Incorrect — /* */ is used in CSS/JS, not HTML.
byOptionId.weirdhtmlcomment: Incorrect — <! comment !> is not valid HTML comment syntax.

explanations.overview: Comments help humans read and maintain code.

byOptionId.readability: Correct — comments improve readability and maintainability.
byOptionId.speed: Incorrect — comments do not affect runtime load speed.
byOptionId.search: Incorrect — comments alone don't improve search ranking.
byOptionId.security: Incorrect — comments do not provide security benefits.
